 {"id":"bd-1by8","title":"demo_showcase: palette + Theme definitions","description":"Define the palette and implement Theme style definitions (named styles used across scenes).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:58.915479693Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:09:33.606030475Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T23:09:33.605967728Z","close_reason":"Completed (demo_showcase Theme definitions + named styles)","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","theme"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1by8","depends_on_id":"bd-2b0s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:17.594674561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1by8","depends_on_id":"bd-2fl5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:58.927882861Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":25,"issue_id":"bd-1by8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Output

- A single `Theme` definition that includes all named styles the demo uses.
- Style names should be descriptive and reusable, e.g.:
  - `brand.title`, `brand.subtitle`
  - `status.ok`, `status.warn`, `status.err`
  - `section.rule`, `panel.title`, `table.header`
  - `log.trace`/`log.debug`/… (even if logger has its own styling)

## Acceptance criteria

- Most scene styling references these names via markup (`[status.ok]OK[/]`) or theme lookup.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:13Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1cdx","title":"demo_showcase: timing/performance tuning","description":"Tune timing and refresh rates so the demo feels smooth but not slow; ensure --quick is truly fast.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:47:25.545745514Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:55:58.780322914Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","perf"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1cdx","depends_on_id":"bd-1y6r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:55:54.014232424Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1cdx","depends_on_id":"bd-3fph","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:55:56.438558342Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1cdx","depends_on_id":"bd-3j1s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:55:58.780293469Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1cdx","depends_on_id":"bd-6ozb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:47:25.560089945Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":63,"issue_id":"bd-1cdx","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Tuning targets

- Default run: “feels animated” but not long (aim ~8–15s interactive).
- `--quick`: near-instant (aim < 3s).
- Refresh rate: cap to something sane (e.g. <= 10 fps).

Ensure sleeps are routed through a single helper so tuning is easy.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:47:46Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1e7c","title":"demo_showcase tests: output toggles matrix","description":"Add e2e tests that verify CLI toggles (emoji/safe-box/links/color-system) produce expected coarse-grained output changes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:35.483660484Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:16:11.109383107Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","demo_showcase","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1e7c","depends_on_id":"bd-11zc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:16:06.438339224Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1e7c","depends_on_id":"bd-2sk1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:35.499628807Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1e7c","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:16:08.762596811Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1e7c","depends_on_id":"bd-5bjf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:16:11.109355686Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":81,"issue_id":"bd-1e7c","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## What to validate

- `--no-emoji` disables emoji shortcode replacement
- `--safe-box` forces ASCII boxes
- `--no-links` removes OSC8 hyperlink sequences
- `--color-system none` yields no ANSI SGR sequences

These tests should be coarse-grained (substring checks), not brittle.

## Dependencies

Requires CLI completeness (`bd-3s5n`) and at least one scene that exercises these features (hero is enough).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:49Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-1gou","title":"demo_showcase: shared Console builder","description":"Build the shared Console from Config (theme, width/height overrides, markup/emoji/links, force_terminal).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:03.491588228Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T00:18:50.378035285Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["console","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-1by8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:51.202039996Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-1o8x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:53.700981077Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:03.502866179Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:12:10.603077125Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":21,"issue_id":"bd-1gou","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Console builder responsibilities

- Apply the demo `Theme` (from the design bead).
- Respect width/height overrides for deterministic output.
- Respect `--force-terminal` to enable color in pipes when requested.
- Provide toggles for markup/emoji/links if we expose them.

## Acceptance criteria

- All scenes use the same Console instance (or share an Arc) so output is consistent.
- Console config is derived solely from `Config` (no hidden env-only behavior except documented defaults like `FORCE_COLOR`).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:27Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-1gou","title":"demo_showcase: shared Console builder","description":"Build the shared Console from Config (theme, width/height overrides, markup/emoji/links, force_terminal).","notes":"Console builder implemented in console_builder.rs with DemoConsole struct, build_demo_console() function, color mode handling, and links toggle. Module wired into demo_showcase.rs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:03.491588228Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T00:53:30.495784548Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T00:53:30.495645749Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["console","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-1by8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:51.202039996Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-1o8x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:53.700981077Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:03.502866179Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gou","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:12:10.603077125Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":21,"issue_id":"bd-1gou","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Console builder responsibilities

- Apply the demo `Theme` (from the design bead).
- Respect width/height overrides for deterministic output.
- Respect `--force-terminal` to enable color in pipes when requested.
- Provide toggles for markup/emoji/links if we expose them.

## Acceptance criteria

- All scenes use the same Console instance (or share an Arc) so output is consistent.
- Console config is derived solely from `Config` (no hidden env-only behavior except documented defaults like `FORCE_COLOR`).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:27Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jk8","title":"demo_showcase: scene runner main loop","description":"Implement the scene runner for full sequence + --scene single-run mode; ensure clean termination.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:10.660057261Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:12:12.965596207Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","runner"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jk8","depends_on_id":"bd-13i9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:06.396819083Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1jk8","depends_on_id":"bd-1gou","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:04.087960586Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1jk8","depends_on_id":"bd-1o8x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:01.602157779Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1jk8","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:10.672997309Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1jk8","depends_on_id":"bd-3j1s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:08.902502053Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1jk8","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:12:12.965565700Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":24,"issue_id":"bd-1jk8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Responsibilities

- Initialize console + theme.
- Decide run mode (full vs single scene).
- Ensure clean teardown for live/screen modes (cursor restored, screen disabled).
- Provide a consistent “section framing” between scenes (rule + title).

## Acceptance criteria

- `--scene hero` runs only that scene and exits 0.
- Full run prints a summary/outro and exits 0.
- Errors are printed via rich_rust (e.g., traceback scene) and still exit non-zero when appropriate.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:50Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1o8x","title":"demo_showcase: Config + CLI parser implementation","description":"Implement a minimal CLI parser and Config struct used by the demo.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:01.166796577Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:14:12.570539185Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T23:01:12.338803683Z","close_reason":"Completed (demo_showcase Config + hand-rolled CLI parser + unit tests)","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1o8x","depends_on_id":"bd-12nv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:48.539079260Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1o8x","depends_on_id":"bd-23h8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:46.096304063Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1o8x","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:01.178894306Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":20,"issue_id":"bd-1o8x","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Implementation notes

- Prefer a small `Config` struct with defaults and a `parse_args(Vec<String>) -> Result<Config, String>` style API.
- Keep parsing strict but friendly: unknown flags show error + hint to `--help`.
- Avoid adding heavy dependencies (e.g., clap) for the demo.

## Acceptance criteria

- `--help` prints usage + examples.
- `--list-scenes` and `--scene <name>` parse correctly.
- Boolean flags support both `--foo` and `--no-foo` where appropriate.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:39:19Z"},{"id":75,"issue_id":"bd-1o8x","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Note (plan refinement)

The initial CLI parser landed, but we are explicitly extending it with `--seed` and `--links` for determinism and hyperlink control (tracked in `bd-3s5n`).

Keep this bead closed as “initial parser delivered”; treat `bd-3s5n` as the incremental follow-up work.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:14:12Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1ohr","title":"Port rich.pretty + rich.inspect equivalents","description":"Implement Rich-style pretty printing / inspection.

Scope:
- Provide a Pretty renderable for Rust values (Debug) with optional syntax highlighting
- Provide an inspect-like helper that prints type info + fields when possible

Acceptance criteria:
- Pretty output is stable and width-aware
- Unit tests cover nested structs/collections
- Document Rust-idiomatic differences vs Python inspect
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:38:55.795289624Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T20:46:35.895142548Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T20:46:35.895076846Z","close_reason":"Implemented Debug-based Pretty/Inspect renderables","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ohr","depends_on_id":"bd-3c90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:39:01.234951263Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
